author: Viggo Meesters
description: Open .plist and .mobileconfig files as read-only trees with search, source view, and profile security warnings. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Open .plist and .mobileconfig files as read-only trees with search, source view, and profile security warnings.
manifest.name: PLIST Viewer

name: PLIST Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial public release of PLIST Viewer.

- Read-only .plist and .mobileconfig viewer.
- Tree, source, and security summary modes.
- XML plist typed values and binary plist detection fallback.
- Mobileconfig warnings for MDM, Wi-Fi, VPN, certificates, root certificates, restrictions, unknown payload types, and sensitive values.

Release assets for Obsidian: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
